chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Appln. No. S – 649 of 2023 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.04.2024 Syed Israr Ahmed Shah, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Aftab Hussain Bhutto, Advocate for Respondent No.7 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< After hearing the learned counsel for the parties at some length, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application is dismissed with consent in the terms whereby the applicant would be at liberty to avail the alternate remedy of filing a Criminal Direct Complaint before the proper forum. Judge ARBROHI
